name: Platina Resources Limited
summary: Platina Resources Limited acquires, explores for, and develops mineral deposits in Australia, the United States, and Greenland. It explores for precious, specialty, and base metals. The company holds 100% interest in the Challa Gold Project, which includes two exploration licences covering an area of 293 square kilometers located in Western Australia; Skaergaard Project consisting of two exploration licenses located on the east coast of Greenland; and Platina Scandium Project located in central New South Wales. It also holds 30% interest in the Munni Munni project comprising four mining licences and an exploration licence covering an approximately 64 square kilometers of tenement area located in Pilbara region of Western Australia. Platina Resources Limited was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Mount Hawthorn, Australia.
